steps.title: Rewrite one equation
steps.content:
From $5x=2y$, solve for $y$ so it can be substituted into the other equation:
$$y=\frac{5}{2}x$$

steps.title: Find the ordered pair
steps.content: Substitute $x=-2$ into $y=\frac{5}{2}x$: $$y=\frac{5}{2}(-2)=-5$$ So the solution is $(-2,-5)$, with the $x$-value first and the $y$-value second. The answer is C.
